title: The West Built the Cheap China System Evidence Pack
research_question: Can the TWIS article claim that Western capitalism helped build the cheap China production system and that later efforts to restrict or reprice cheap direct buying risk making poorer consumers pay more?
scope: Controlled TWIS article/sandbox pack using one article-draft source. This pack tests whether Evidence Pack v1 can hold a second small article proof trail. It is not a full publication evidence pack.
notes: Second controlled TWIS article/sandbox Evidence Pack. It uses one article-draft source and makes only a narrow editorial-method claim. External trade, tariff, supply-chain, and consumer-price facts still need separate source records before publication use.
